spacing_and_layout.strategy: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID
spacing_and_layout.container: w-full h-screen grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-4 border-collapse overflow-hidden

columns.name: Conversation List Panel
columns.styles: border-r border-gray-200 bg-gray-50 flex flex-col h-full overflow-hidden

columns.name: Chat Message Interface
columns.styles: border-r border-gray-200 bg-white flex flex-col h-full overflow-hidden

spacing_and_layout.shadows: None. Use 1px solid strokes for boundaries.

ChatBubble.style: Rectangular, sharp edges. Left aligned (gray-100 bg) for incoming. Right aligned (green-500 bg, white text) for outgoing.

ConversationListItem.style: p-4 border-b border-gray-200 cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors duration-200

MessageInput.style: p-4 border-t border-gray-200 bg-white flex items-end gap-2
MessageInput.input: w-full resize-none p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-green-500 focus:border-green-500
MessageInput.button: bg-green-500 hover:bg-green-600 text-white rounded-sm px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors

Tag.style: px-2 py-1 bg-gray-200 text-gray-800 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.1em] rounded-sm

icons.usage: Use Phosphor Icons (Regular or Bold weight) for high-density dashboard actions.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do not use Space Grotesk. Import Chivo and IBM Plex Sans via Google Fonts.
Do not use Shadcn Card component. Use cardless, dense HTML divs with solid 1px borders.
Implement polling for real-time updates for chat messages.
Make the layout full viewport height (h-screen) without whole page scrolling; only the conversation list and chat history should scroll internally (overflow-y-auto).
Use data-testid extensively on all interactive elements as defined.
Stick to the 'Grid Borders' micro-theme: Expose the skeleton, 1px borders everywhere, zero soft shadows.
Ensure the green used is accessible, adjusting text-shadow or text color if necessary to meet APCA contrast standards.
